title: 'bat.insert' undefined
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE foo (a INT, b VARCHAR(50), c FLOAT DEFAULT NULL);
INSERT INTO foo (a, b, c) VALUES (1, 'test1', 1.1), (2, 'test2', NULL), (3, 'test3', 3.3);
CREATE TABLE bar (x INT PRIMARY KEY, y INT, FOREIGN KEY (y) REFERENCES foo(a));
INSERT INTO bar (x, y) VALUES (1, 1), (2, 2), (3, NULL);
SELECT SUM(c) FROM foo WHERE b IS NOT NULL GROUP BY a HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
key_bug_features: insert into foo with multiple values
